def: A letter sent with a job application to introduce yourself.
A signed agreement setting out the terms of a person's job.

The amount of work a person has to do.
To give a task or authority to someone else.
To agree on a plan or action with others.
To keep growing and improving over time.
Having a strong wish to succeed or achieve a lot.

Unable to stop using or doing something harmful.

To grow old over time.
The movement of people from one place to another to live.

Willing to accept views or behaviour different from one's own.

A healthy balance between one's job and personal life.

To manage to cope or get oriented in a new place.

Based on ideas rather than physical things; not directly representing reality.

Carrying or burdened with more than it can handle.

Carefully judging faults and merits; also serious or crucial.
Done without careful thought; uncritical.
